generated.findings: Normal heart size, stable tortuous aorta, clear lungs with prominent coarse interstitial markings throughout, focal streaky bibasilar opacities on frontal view, no pneumothorax or pleural effusion.
generated.impression: No acute cardiopulmonary abnormality. Stable interstitial fibrotic changes throughout both lungs.

ground_truth.findings: Left lower lobe calcified granuloma. Heart size normal. No pleural effusion or pneumothorax. Mild medial right atelectasis. Mild emphysema.
ground_truth.impression: Emphysema and mild medial right atelectasis. No acute process.
